name: AgentTeam
summary: The persona-routing brain of Bill Whalen's Agent Team Starter Kit, ported to a single rapplication. Given a project goal, returns the outcome frame, persona route, paste-ready GitHub issue body, and the needs-you questions the team would surface.
tagline: Plan a project the way the kit would.

action.description: Which slice of the plan to produce. Default: route (the full envelope).

goal.description: The raw project request. What does the team need to deliver?

domain.description: Optional domain hint to bias persona routing: d365, ai, power-platform, analytics, generic.

constraints.description: Optional constraints: deadlines, budget, compliance, must-use stack, must-not-use, etc.
